examples: Her official designation is Financial Controller.
The new black controller still doesn't have backlit buttons—don't let the pic fool you.
There is no give and take, as the controller is uncomfortable and bossy if you want to make a choice about something.
Touch screens have limited application in video games and a good controller is needed for the best experience.
Rounding out the motion controls is strafing, which can be done by tilting the controller left and right.
